title: hierochloe odorata
intro: Hierochloe odorata, also known as sweet grass, is a perennial grass native to Northern Europe and North America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its essential oils, which have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of sweet grass include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Sweet grass is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in aromatherapy and as a natural insect repellent.
